meta.tagline: Brooklyn inpatient detox + rehab · Red Hook pin
meta.author: Aleksandar Spasevski
meta.doc_subtitle: 13×13 grid 92.8% held · GBP depth surge · service-page rebuild + NAP fix · cross-borough location upgrades · counter SNF drift on inpatient rehab · disavow + YMYL trust citations.

tldr: Urban Recovery held the Red Hook 13×13 grid while the market churned hard around it — pooled top-10 cell appearances across 8 priority queries × 1,344 cells went +21 net Jan 27 → Apr 22 2026 (1,092 → 1,113), and UR is the only Brooklyn addiction-treatment pin to gain net top-10 cells in the window. Within the grid UR covers 92.8% of cells with rank 2.0–2.2 on Brooklyn-tagged queries; broad terms IMPROVED meaningfully (alcohol rehab 5.71 → 4.48, drug rehab 6.49 → 5.64). Brand engine fires correctly (urban recovery 1,357 clicks/365d @ pos 2.26) and the GBP-tagged homepage drove 3,275 clicks/365d at 1.18% CTR — the live GBP→site→intake conversion path. But four structural ceilings cap the lift: (a) cross-borough non-diffusion 8/40 cells at 5 Brooklyn anchor coords, (b) GBP depth gap 7 photos / 1 Post / 3.8★ with 23% 1-star share, (c) thin service-page conversion surface with zero JSON-LD and 9,269 local-intent queries ranking pos 1–3 at near-zero CTR (`recovery center brooklyn` 13.77K imp / 0 clicks @ pos 3.55 is the headline), (d) PBN exposure 61% of RDs spam-rating ≥30 with 216 RDs in the `anomaly-seo-*` cluster. Q2 lift compounds on 5 pushes: GBP depth surge (Posts 4/mo + Photos 7→30+ + Reviews +20/mo) · Service-page rebuild + homepage NAP fix · cross-borough location-page upgrades · counter SNF category drift on `inpatient rehab` · data-warranted disavow + YMYL trust citations + LGBTQ+-affirming PR.

kpis.label: 13×13 grid coverage (8 queries × 1,344 cells)
kpis.detail: 1,247 of 1,344 cells held Jan 27 → Apr 22 2026 (was 93.4%). UR fully radiates across its 3.25-mi Red Hook catchment on 7 of 8 priority queries. Only Brooklyn addiction pin gaining net top-10 cells (+21).

kpis.label: Top-10 cells gained vs market churn
kpis.detail: 1,092 → 1,113 top-10 cells pooled across 8 queries. Direct competitor Detox & Drug/Alcohol Rehab Center NY gained +52; Brooklyn Center for Rehabilitation and Nursing (SNF) +39; Addiction Treatment Brooklyn vanished (−138). UR held while market churned.

kpis.label: Brand engine (urban recovery 365d)
kpis.detail: urban recovery 1,357 clicks/365d @ pos 2.26 · urban recovery brooklyn 290 clicks @ pos 1.83 · GBP-tagged homepage (/?utm_source=gmb) 3,275 clicks @ 1.18% CTR. The live GBP→site→intake conversion path.

kpis.label: Service-page conversion leak
kpis.detail: 9,269 local-intent queries rank pos 1–3 at near-zero CTR. `recovery center brooklyn` 13,770 imp / 0 clicks @ pos 3.55 (headline). /services/* (5 URLs) on doorway templates with zero JSON-LD. SP-01 + SP-02 + HP-01 + ON-02 = structural fix.

kpis.label: GBP depth gap (photos / posts / rating)
kpis.detail: 7 photos vs Ascendant 90 / Mountainside 30 · 1 GBP Post in scrape window · 3.8★ with 23% 1-star share (26 of 111 reviews) · place_topics = null. Photo count is documented Maps freshness ranker. 1-star share is a YMYL deprioritization signal.

kpis.label: Off-page PBN exposure (61% RDs spam ≥30)
kpis.detail: 1,642 BL / 958 RDs / 642 unique / domain spam-score 42. 395 RDs at spam-rating ≥30 (61% of profile). 216 RDs match `anomaly-seo-*` PBN cluster (top reaches spam-94). 323 RDs on PBN-pattern TLDs (.online .website .site .space .xyz). Disavow data-warranted.

trend.headline: GA4 — sessions + leads + engagement, 18 months. Leads = form_submit (organic last 90d: 22). Phone / Email / GMB clicks shown separately as intent signals.
trend.annotation_text: GA4 default-channel-grouping. Leads counted as form_submit events only. Phone/Email CTA clicks and GMB→site sessions are intent signals — shown in the Engagement panel below.
trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 partial — first ~20 days of the month at trailing daily rate.

positives: Held the 13×13 grid (92.8% coverage, 1,247/1,344) while every other Brooklyn addiction pin churned — only pin gaining net top-10 cells (+21)
Broad terms IMPROVED meaningfully: `alcohol rehab` avg rank 5.71 → 4.48; `drug rehab` 6.49 → 5.64 (Jan 27 → Apr 22 2026)
Brand engine fires correctly — `urban recovery` 1,357 clicks/365d @ pos 2.26; `urban recovery brooklyn` 290 clicks @ pos 1.83
GBP→site→intake conversion path proven — GBP-tagged homepage (/?utm_source=gmb) drove 3,275 clicks/365d at 1.18% CTR
Brooklyn-tagged queries owned at rank 2.0–2.2 (alcohol/drug rehab brooklyn, rehab brooklyn, detox brooklyn)
Real commercial differentiators in NYC recovery — `is_owned_by_women`, `welcomes_lgbtq`, `is_transgender_safespace` GBP attributes + Medicaid acceptance
Competitor collapses freeing market share — Addiction Treatment Brooklyn vanished (−138), Upper East Side Rehab Nursing −104, Samaritan Village vanished (−52)
Q2 marginal lift is structural (HQDM-side service-page rebuild + GBP depth + disavow) — not gated on owner-side cadence beyond photo brief + insurance + CARF confirmations
negatives: Cross-borough Maps non-diffusion — 8/40 cells at 5-coord matrix, all 8 at Red Hook pin. Zero at Downtown Brooklyn / Williamsburg / Crown Heights / Sunset Park / Coney Island
GBP depth gap on the pin — 7 photos vs Ascendant 90 / Mountainside 30 · 1 GBP Post in scrape window · 3.8★ with 23% 1-star share (26 of 111) · place_topics null
Service-page conversion surface thin — /services/* (5 URLs) on doorway templates with zero JSON-LD. `recovery center brooklyn` 13.77K imp / 0 clicks @ pos 3.55 is the headline conversion leak
Homepage JSON-LD NAP mismatch — telephone (646) 960-6656 in only schema block sitewide vs GBP canonical (646) 347-1892. One-line fix (HP-01)
9,269 local-intent queries ranking pos 1–3 at near-zero CTR — GBP authority not converting on organic SERP service-page entries

Off-page PBN exposure — 1,642 BL / 642 unique RDs / domain spam-score 42; 395 RDs (61%) at spam-rating ≥30; 216 in `anomaly-seo-*` cluster (top spam-94); 323 on PBN-pattern TLDs (.online .website .site)

SNF category drift on `inpatient rehab` — 85 → 75 cells (−10) driven by Brooklyn Center for Rehabilitation and Nursing entering 0 → 102 cells in 90 days (entity-class category ambiguity, not addiction competition)
Direct competitor Detox & Drug/Alcohol Rehab Center In Brooklyn, NY gaining +52 cells across every single tracked query — M1 forensic pull required

levers.name: GBP depth surge — defend Red Hook + diffuse
levers.why: GBP is the moat and conversion path. Pin works (1,247/1,344 cells, GBP-tagged homepage 3,275 clicks @ 1.18% CTR) but depth signals are starved: 7 photos vs Ascendant 90, 1 Post in scrape window, 3.8★ with 23% 1-star share. Photo count is documented Maps freshness ranker. 1-star share is a documented YMYL deprioritization signal. Positive-volume dilution (+20 reviews/mo) is the only competitive lever a single-pin can pull at this scale.

actions.name: GBP Posts M1 — 4 Posts (≥1/week cadence + 1 explicit Inpatient phrasing)
GBP Services tab audit + custom descriptions (5 services + MAT additions if Owner Ask #1 confirmed)
Review-velocity push — +20 reviews/month M1–M3 → 170+ by M3 close (intake-SOP operationalized)
GBP attributes + description tightening (is_owned_by_women + welcomes_lgbtq + is_transgender_safespace + OASAS + same-day admissions)
Owner-gated photo blitz — 7 → 30+ across 6 categories (exterior 411 Van Brunt + interior + intake + staff w/HIPAA framing + Red Hook + women-owned/LGBTQ+ env cues)
GBP Posts M2 — 4 Posts linking to upgraded SP-01 + LP-02_M1 anchors
GBP Posts M3 + Services-tab final audit
Owner replies on all <4★ reviews + M3 velocity verification (target 1-star share <18%)

levers.outcome: Reviews 111 → 170+, 1-star share 23% → <18%, photos 7 → 30+, Posts 1 → ≥4/mo sustained. Engagement density unlocks cross-borough Maps diffusion.

levers.name: Service-page rebuild + homepage NAP fix + page refresh
levers.why: 9,269 local-intent queries rank pos 1–3 at near-zero CTR. `recovery center brooklyn` 13.77K imp / 0 clicks @ pos 3.55 is the headline leak. /services/* (5 URLs) on doorway templates with zero JSON-LD. Homepage JSON-LD telephone (646) 960-6656 ≠ GBP canonical (646) 347-1892 — NAP mismatch in the only schema block sitewide. Converts GBP authority into organic clicks.

actions.name: Homepage JSON-LD NAP fix — telephone 646-960-6656 → 646-347-1892 (one-line schema edit + RRT + GSC re-crawl)
Upgrade /services/alcohol-detoxification-service — 1,400-1,600w + Service + LocalBusiness + FAQPage schema + intake form + Areas We Serve
Page refresh on 12 conversion-intent URLs (visible H1 + hero + body + intake CTA + NAP verification)
Explicit `Inpatient Drug & Alcohol Rehab Brooklyn — 24-Hour Medical Supervision` framing on /services/short-term-residential-program
Upgrade /services/opioid-detoxification-services with MAT positioning (Buprenorphine + Naltrexone + Vivitrol)

levers.outcome: `recovery center brooklyn` CTR 0% → ≥3% (~400 clicks/90d). 12 URLs page-refreshed with NAP corrected + intake CTA visible. SP-01/SP-02 schema validates. /services/short-term-residential-program counters SNF drift.

levers.name: Cross-borough location-page upgrades + LP-01 data-driven cleanup
levers.why: Single-pin Maps reach hard-capped at 3.25-mi grid radius. Cross-borough capture is organic-only. 96 /locations/* URLs, 0 with schema. 8 LP-02 UPGRADES (not new builds — every cross-borough target already has a verbose-slug page in the sitemap). Highest-leverage cross-borough URL: /locations/recovery-center-in-sunset-park-ny at 1,722w / 3,152 imp / 26 clicks / pos 19.58 — one push from page 1.

actions.name: Location upgrades M1 — 3 in-radius anchors (red-hook-ny + carroll-gardens-red-hook + gowanus) — content audit + LocalBusiness + BreadcrumbList schema
Location-pages cleanup M1 — 96-URL GSC pull + refresh batch 1 (3 on-topic bleeding URLs) + 0-click cohort 301/410 (data-driven, NEVER bulk NOINDEX)
Location upgrades M2 — 3 adjacency + cross-borough (park-slope-ny + boerum-hill-ny + recovery-center-in-sunset-park-ny — primary diffusion target)
Location-pages refresh batch 2 (3 URLs from working sheet)
Location upgrades M3 — 2 cross-borough conditional (leading-rehab-center-in-downtown-brooklyn-ny + rehab-center-in-crown-heights-ny; M3 W1 gate on REP-02 cross-borough delta)
Location-pages refresh batch 3 (3 URLs from working sheet)

levers.outcome: 8 existing /locations/* URLs upgraded with LocalBusiness + BreadcrumbList schema. Cross-borough 5-coord matrix 8/40 → ≥14/40 (radiate to ≥2 adjacent coords). /locations/recovery-center-in-sunset-park-ny pos 19.58 → ≤12.

levers.name: Counter SNF category drift on `inpatient rehab`
levers.why: `inpatient rehab` LD grid 85 → 75 cells (−10) in 90 days. Brooklyn Center for Rehabilitation and Nursing (SNF, not addiction-treatment) entered 0 → 102 cells in same window — entity-class category ambiguity, not direct competition. UR's /services/short-term-residential-program currently doesn't use 'Inpatient' in primary framing. Sharpening lever: explicit positioning + GBP Posts using 'Inpatient' phrasing 1×/month + M3 forensic pull on SNF mechanism.

actions.name: Explicit `Inpatient Drug & Alcohol Rehab Brooklyn — 24-Hour Medical Supervision` framing on /services/short-term-residential-program (H1 + hero + body)
1 GBP Post in M1 explicitly using `Inpatient` phrasing (to counter SNF category drift signal)
1 GBP Post in M2 using `Inpatient` phrasing + link to refreshed /services/short-term-residential-program
1 GBP Post in M3 using `Inpatient` phrasing — close the cadence
M3 forensic pull on Brooklyn Center for Rehabilitation and Nursing mechanism (review velocity / GBP edits / on-page changes / category claim) — informs Q3 SP-03 rebuild scope

levers.outcome: `inpatient rehab` cells 75 → 100+ via explicit framing + GBP cadence. SNF threat sustainability verdict documented for Q3 SP-03 full rebuild scope.

levers.name: Off-page disavow + YMYL trust citations + LGBTQ+-affirming PR + Q-format LLM articles
levers.why: PBN exposure is data-warranted disavow case: 395 of 642 RDs at spam-rating ≥30 (61%), 216 in `anomaly-seo-*` cluster (top spam-94), 323 on PBN-pattern TLDs, domain spam-score 42. YMYL trust citations (SAMHSA + Psych Today + CARF + LegitScript + NAATP + insurance directories) build credible profile signal. PR pitch leverages real GBP differentiators (women-owned + LGBTQ+-affirming + transgender-safespace + Medicaid). Q-format LLM articles seed PAA + AI Overview surfaces. SEO Neo / DAS / GBP Blast / Sniper / RD100 / NAP-Overlay / AI-Articles / GMB-Pin-Support / Driving-Directions stack REMOVED per 2026-05-13 off-page program halt.

actions.name: Disavow build + upload — per-row Decisions sheet review of 395 RDs at spam-rating ≥30; disavow.txt uploaded to GSC
YMYL trust citations Tier 1 — SAMHSA findtreatment.gov + Psychology Today (clinical-lead profile) + CARF directory (or Joint Commission substitute)
LLM citation share baseline audit — 5 surfaces × 4 differentiator queries (women-owned/LGBTQ+/transgender-safespace/Medicaid-detox-Brooklyn)
YMYL trust citations Tier 2 — LegitScript + NAATP + insurance directories (Aetna + Cigna + BCBS, gated on Owner Ask #2 in-network confirmation)
PR pitch — LGBTQ+-affirming inpatient detox Red Hook angle to behavioralhealthnews.org + 1 NYC trade outlet (4-6wk lead, gated on Owner Ask #4 clinical-lead consent)
YMYL trust citations Tier 3 — recovery-vertical (best-rehabs + alcoholism.org + sobasearch + helpguide.org) + Brooklyn-local health resource
Disavow re-pull M3 W1 — capture new toxic RDs since M1; append + re-upload
3 Q-format LLM-targeted articles M3 (Medicaid for detox Brooklyn / women-owned rehab Brooklyn / LGBTQ rehab Brooklyn) — 1,000-1,200w each with FAQ schema
On-topic blog refresh batch 1 — 3 bleeding posts (detox/withdrawal/MAT/dual-diagnosis cluster)
On-topic blog refresh batch 2 — 3 bleeding posts
On-topic blog refresh batch 3 — 3 bleeding posts

levers.outcome: Disavow uploaded M1 + re-pulled M3. ≥8 new YMYL trust citations live. 1 LGBTQ+-affirming PR pitch placed. 3 Q-format LLM articles live. 9 on-topic blog posts refreshed. +1 LLM citation surface per query by M3.

levers.name: Reporting + indexation tracking + Q2 close-out
levers.why: Marija's MoM Summary `% Reports With Full Correlation` requires every M1-M3 task → action → outcome metric tracked. 24 LD scans (8 terms × 3 coords) configured M1 give 4-week baseline ready by M2.

actions.name: LD scan setup + baseline pull — 24 weekly scans (8 priority terms × 3 Brooklyn coords: Red Hook pin + Sunset Park + Downtown Brooklyn)
Indexation tracker + ON-02 CTR delta + LP-01 removed-URL verification (URL Inspection API + GSC delta pull)

Q2 close-out — planned → executed → impact correlation. Every row populated with Result/Notes/Evidence (5-coord cross-borough delta + 13×13 Red Hook delta + GBP review/photo/post metrics + SP/LP rank movement + disavow effect)

levers.outcome: Single Q2 close-out report shipped to Milica with full row correlation. Indexation tracker confirms SP-01/SP-02/LP-02 + 0-click 301s hit GSC index. Baseline metrics for Q3.

owner_asks: Publish-permission for 4 location-page upgrades + 2-3 new builds + 2 service-page upgrades — standing approval with 24-hour preview-window emailed to UR marketing (Surfpoint model). Gates the M1 → M2 → M3 cadence on LP-02 + SP-01/SP-02.

Confirm in-network insurance carriers — Aetna + Cigna + BCBS + Medicaid status (in-network vs out-of-network with reimbursement). Gates OFF-Citations_M2 insurance-directory submissions + SP-01/SP-02 insurance block accuracy.

CARF accreditation status verification (yes/no + effective date + certificate number). If not in place, substitute Joint Commission Behavioral Health for OFF-Citations_M1. Affects E-E-A-T section of SP-01/SP-02.

Clinical-lead consent for Psychology Today profile + 200-300w bio + headshot. Required for OFF-Citations_M1 Psychology Today (DA 91, highest-trust addiction-treatment citation gated on real clinician identity). Also feeds OFF-PR_M2 LGBTQ+-affirming pitch.

kpi_targets.kpi: `recovery center brooklyn` CTR (13,770 imp / 0 clicks @ pos 3.55)

gsc_organic_trend.headline: Organic ramped steadily from Q3 2025; Apr 2026 blog-cohort surge (porn-addiction + claustrophobia + acronym-halt page-1 jumps drove +1.6M imp single-month). GBP-tagged homepage conversion path stable through the quarter.
gsc_organic_trend.annotation_text: Source: GSC Search Analytics — daily 365d export aggregated to month (855 pages / 13.81M imp / 44.14K clicks). Apr 2026 surge is blog-side (informational impressions gained as blog cluster moved up to page 1–2 across multiple long-tail health queries). Homepage and service-page impressions stable. May 2026 partial (first 14 days).
gsc_organic_trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 partial — first 14 days at trailing pace.

snapshot.title: Urban Recovery
snapshot.subtitle: Q2 2026 · Brooklyn · Red Hook pin · Client Snapshot
snapshot.footer: Client snapshot · Q2 2026 · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.exec_html: Urban Recovery held its Red Hook Maps grid while the market churned hard around it — you're the only Brooklyn addiction-treatment pin to gain net top-10 coverage this period (+21 cells across eight priority searches), holding 92.8% of the 1,344-cell grid. Your brand engine is strong (1,357 clicks at position 2.3). The biggest near-term lever is on-site: thousands of high-intent service-page queries already rank on page one and are ready to be sharpened into clearer paths to call and intake. Strengthening those service pages, fixing the homepage business-info mismatch, and a Google Business depth push are the priorities.

line.title: Organic Performance · Monthly (Feb → May 2026)

focus.title: GBP depth surge
focus.body: Defend Red Hook and diffuse outward with a Google Business depth push — posts, photos, services, Q&A.

focus.title: Service-page rebuild
focus.body: Rebuild the high-intent service pages that rank but don’t convert, and fix the homepage business-info mismatch.

focus.title: Cross-borough location pages
focus.body: Upgrade cross-borough location pages and clean up the thin, data-driven ones.

focus.title: Counter category drift
focus.body: Push inpatient-rehab framing to counter the nursing-facility category drift pulling on those rankings.

competitors.title: Competitor Movement · Maps

cells.t: Wellbridge Drug & Alcohol Rehab NYC Outreach

competitors.note_html: You're the only Brooklyn addiction-treatment pin to gain net coverage this period (+21). The competitors above all lost ground in the same window — Addiction Treatment Brooklyn dropped off the Maps grid entirely; Wellbridge, LSA Recovery (Crown Heights), and Dynamite Youth Center each shed ~37–39 cells. Avg rank for the 4 competitors is the live DataForSEO Maps scan across the 8 priority searches (May 28). Lower avg rank is better.
